productDisplayName: Redtape Men Candy Tan Casual Shoes
description: Cut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Inspired by the rugged Texas plains and the cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these leather shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Reinforced overlay for the heel Central lacing system High on the ankle for style Midsole Upper stitched to the TPR midsole for durability Outsole Textured TPR outsole with a raised heel shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
